backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing CRUD operations for content management with in-memory Map storage, including create, read, update, delete, and list all content items.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: landing page design, interactive showcase, React Query integration, and coral/teal design system with high confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of eight frontend files covering routing, layout, pages, components, hooks, and styling with coral/teal theme.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for coral/teal design system with custom CSS properties.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Nexus Portal application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with landing and content manager routes, theme provider, layout wrapper, and toast notifications.
Interactive feature showcase component displaying three cards with icons, hover effects, geometric backgrounds, and coral/teal color transitions.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shared layout component with sticky header, navigation links, mobile menu toggle, Nexus Portal branding, and footer with social links.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook managing Internet Identity authentication and actor initialization with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
React Query hooks for all content CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete, list) with automatic cache invalidation and actor integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity storage, and delegation validation with AuthClient integration.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom coral/teal color system, light/dark mode variables using OKLCH color space, and geometric animation utilities for modern UI effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/ContentManager.tsx: Content management page with CRUD operations for creating, editing, and deleting content items, using React Query mutations and displaying content in cards with form validation.
frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx: Hero landing page with geometric animations, coral/teal gradient design, background image overlay, feature statistics, and call-to-action buttons navigating to content manager.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme with OKLCH color system for coral/teal branding, custom animations (float, gradient), container settings, and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features (landing page, feature showcase, React Query integration, design system) and pending backend CRUD operations feature request.
